0._value: I wonder how #p407#'s doing with the hang glider... Maybe I should go check up on him in #m10003000#.

1._value: #p407# failed to create a working hang glider, and is now attempting to create a flying balloon on his never-ending quest for flight. This looks just as preposterous as his last attempt, but I don't think I can stop him. To make the flying balloon, he needs #b50 #t4000028#s and 10 #t4031078#s#k. Hope this works...

2._value: I got the materials needed for #p407# to make the flying balloon and realize his dream of flying. I don't know if his "flying balloon" will actually fly, but there's a chance that it might work. I'll check up on him around when the flying balloon should be ready to take flight and see if he's for real this time.

0._value: Hey, you're the one that got me the materials for the hang glider...\r\n#L0##bDid you make the hang glider?#k

1._value: Oh, that... well... I faced MINOR, I mean, MIIINOR technical difficulties, and... well don't worry about it! #p407# does NOT let MINOR obstacles like this affect him! Anyway, I was thinking of a safer and more reliable way to fly, and I think I have a great plan. Are you willing to help me out again?

0._value: I knew you'd help! We'll make the best flying balloon in the world! It should consist of a huge balloon, with a basket at the bottom big enough to fit both of us. To make it, I'll need #b50 #t4000028#s#k for the huge balloon, and #b10 #t4031078#s#k for the sandbags that'll be needed to keep the balloon balanced.

1._value: I have the basket ready. As for the #t4031078#es, they're made exclusively out of #r#o29##k skin, and you can get them by hunting the #r#o29#s#k in the swamp. Good luck!

0._value: Trust me, we'll be flying this time! Wouldn't it stink to give it up right now, when we're so close?

1._value: You're just like everyone else living in a box. Wake up, think outside the box! You'll see... you'll see me flying around here some day.

0._value: I've been working on the basket, to see if it is sturdy enough to hold both of us. Now all we need is a big balloon. Did you gather up the materials I asked you for?
Wow, that's a lot!! Well, I'll have to get started on making the balloon. Please drop by sometime later, I should be done by then. We'll be floating our way to Ossyria in no time!

Did you get all the materials I asked for? I don't think you have all of them! Please gather #b50 #t4000028#s and 10 #t4031078#s#k for me. You can get #b#t4031078#s#k from #r#o29#s#k. Please hurry~ The faster you get them for me, the faster we'll be floating up in the air!
